prompt: Create a dramatic macro 3D scientific visualization of Hantavirus as a frightening spherical viral particle floating in a dark microscopic environment. The central subject is one large virion in sharp focus, with a rough fibrous gray-brown outer shell covered in many translucent red-orange trumpet-shaped spike proteins arranged around the entire circumference. Show a cutaway-like glowing inner core visible through the front surface, filled with warm golden bioluminescent particles and a thick coiled turquoise RNA strand curled in a spiral knot. Surround the main virion with 4 out-of-focus background viral particles: one large blurred particle in the upper left, one large blurred particle in the upper right, one partial blurred particle at the lower left edge, and one partial blurred particle at the right edge. Use cinematic depth of field, volumetric haze, floating dust-like microscopic particles, teal-green and amber color grading, high contrast rim lighting, hyper-detailed textures, semi-realistic biomedical illustration style, scary ominous mood, ultra high resolution, no text, no labels, no watermark.
